analysis.reasoning: Core message: The speaker met the European Parliament President after EUCO, stressing that EP support is crucial to deliver reforms, investments, and build a modern, more sustainable Union. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – not explicitly; no reference to past successes or historical trajectory. EU2 (EU is united) – implicitly suggests institutional cooperation (Council and Parliament alignment) but does not claim unity or agreement; cautious no. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – yes, it links EP support to delivering reforms and investments that improve the Union, implying practical action benefiting Europeans. EU4 (EU as avant-garde actor) – partial hints via “modern and more sustainable Union,” but no explicit leadership/pioneering claim; likely no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not mentioned. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – focus is internal EU reform, not global role; no. Conclusion: Promotes EU3.
